did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Training materials produced by Janet Salmons-Rue, Andrea Parrot, and the Cornell Coalition Advocating Rape Education (C.A.R.E.)

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Cornell University's Coalition Advocating Rape Education (C.A.R.E.) had members across the university, including staff of Gannett Health Services and Prof. Andrea Parrot, and collaborated with the Department of Theatre Arts to produce training materials on date rape in the late 1980s. Around 1990, the name changed to Cornell Advocates for Rape Education.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Training materials produced by Janet Salmons-Rue, Andrea Parrot, and the Cornell Coalition Advocating Rape Education (C.A.R.E.)

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: Related collection: Cornell University Contraception, Gynecology and Sexuality Service Records, #51-1-2511.

did.unittitle: "Stop Date Rape" (Brochure and Script)- Janet Salmons-Rue and C.A.R.E.
"I Know You Said No but I Thought You Meant Yes" (Brochure and Training Manual)- Andrea Parrot
"I Know You Said No but I Thought You Meant Yes" (Video)

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Coalition Advocating Rape Education records, #53-6-3867. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
